## Portfolio Website Setup

- [x] Create .github directory structure
- [x] Scaffold the Vite React project
- [x] Customize with portfolio components
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Create and run development task
- [x] Verify compilation
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete

This is a React portfolio website built with Vite. The project includes sections for projects, about, and contact.
